text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Looking great, Tata! You're so shiny
now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Maruzensky is polishing her car, Tata.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello, Trainer. It's a beautiful day, isn't it? ♪
choice_data_list: Are you doing some maintenance on Tata?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello, Trainer. It's a beautiful day, isn't it? ♪
choice_data_list: Are you doing some maintenance on Tata?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I had some free time. But I actually just
finished. ♪
choice_data_list: You look like you're in a good mood.
You look like you're in a good mood.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I absi-posolutely am! It's always nice to spend
some quality time with my precious partner.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
If I take care of her, she'll thank me by running
perfectly. Isn't that nice?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I'm sure I don't have to explain it to you,
Trainer. I bet you already know exactly what I
mean.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I'm sure I don't have to explain it to you,
Trainer. I bet you already know exactly what I
mean.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm just like Tata in a way...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I run so well because you take such good care of
me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I run so well because you take such good care of
me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Your coaching makes me want to give my all.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Your coaching makes me want to give my all.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: There, Tata's all cleaned up. Now it's your turn!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: There, Tata's all cleaned up. Now it's your turn!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I need your best support so I can do my best
running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky goes to training with even more
gusto than usual.
